segments.text: My heart is not proud, Lord, my eyes are not haughty; I do not concern myself with great matters or things too wonderful for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But I have calmed and quieted myself, I am like a weaned child with its mother; like a weaned child I am content.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Israel, put your hope in the Lord both now and forevermore.
segments.speaker: David
